supabaseChangelogCheck.summary: Checked recent Supabase Auth/breaking-change entries before changing local Auth/permission handling.

authReproduction.summary: Reproduced Invalid login credentials before reseeding, then verified qa-operator@fcmoim.test/password signs in successfully after the fix.

localSeed.command: npm run qa:seed-auth:local && npm run db:local:seed-demo
localSeed.summary: QA Auth users were updated to password and clean local demo data was rebuilt successfully after service_role grants were applied.

targetedUiTest.summary: Frontend auth and schedule UI tests passed: 71 tests.

localApiTest.summary: Local Supabase API tests passed: 15 tests.

dataEvidence.command: npm run db:local:seed-demo && npm run db:check && npx supabase migration list --local
dataEvidence.summary: Tracked SQL migration grants service_role access to public schema tables/sequences; local demo data rebuild and SQL contract checks passed, and migration list shows the new local migration file.

browserRuntime.provider: npm run dev, in-app browser, server terminal log
browserRuntime.command: npm run dev; Browser reload http://localhost:3000/
browserRuntime.summary: Dev server was running at http://localhost:3000/, first screen rendered in the in-app browser, and server logs showed /api/membership/clubs plus /api/membership?... returning 200 after QA login reseed. Browser automation could not reliably fire the form submit event, so direct Auth/API evidence covers the credential regression.

baseline.summary: Harness validation, lint, typecheck, and full Vitest suite passed: 19 test files passed, 1 skipped; 231 tests passed, 15 skipped.

dbContract.summary: Supabase contract check passed with 20 SQL files.

issuesObserved: Local Supabase CLI now exposes both SECRET_KEY and SERVICE_ROLE_KEY; admin seed scripts selected SECRET_KEY first, which could update Auth users but failed Data API table writes with permission denied.
missedEvidence: Browser automation could not produce a reliable click-to-home proof because the in-app automation surface did not fire the form submission event, but direct Auth, local seed, local API, and server API logs verified the real failing path.
harnessImprovementProposal: For local Supabase auth regressions, verify direct Auth credentials and seed scripts before attributing the issue to UI copy or form state.
retrospective.reason: The fix is project-specific Supabase key precedence and grant handling, not a reusable Harness rule.
